question: Operators flagged a short window of unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days. First identify the sensor channels installed on this asset, then run an anomaly check and trend analysis on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) to determine whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift.
effective_question: Operators flagged a short window of unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days. First identify the sensor channels installed on this asset, then run an anomaly check and trend analysis on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) to determine whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift. What is the typical operating range for the winding temperature on T-014? Are there any known maintenance or calibration issues with the temperature sensors on this asset?

clarifying_questions: What is the typical operating range for the winding temperature on T-014?
Are there any known maintenance or calibration issues with the temperature sensors on this asset?
assumptions: The temperature sensor channels are installed and functioning correctly.
The anomaly check and trend analysis will be performed using historical data from the last few days.

answer: Based on the results, the unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days appear to be a single burst of anomalies rather than a sustained shift. The anomaly check identified two instances of high temperature readings (136.394°C and 131.905°C) with z-scores above 3.0, indicating significant deviations from the normal range. The trend analysis showed a stable trend with a slight positive slope, but the anomalies occurred outside of this trend. Additionally, there are no known maintenance or calibration issues with the temperature sensors on T-014.

First identify the sensor channels installed on this asset, then run an anomaly check and trend analysis on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) to determine whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift.
